examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: >> We're on a guided tour now. Our guide is taking us to all of the best photo spots around the city. He is a professional photographer. I swear he's telling us how to pose and taking great photos of us. Look at these. We definitely got the shot. This is going to be my new profile picture.

examples: I was exhausted after the long hike.
She looked exhausted from working overtime.
The kids were exhausted after playing all day.
context: It was a full day today and we're all pretty exhausted. So, we're heading back to the resort now.

examples: We went to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.

context: We're staying at a super fancy resort.

examples: This iced tea is so refreshing.

context: Ooh, it has a little kick to it, but it's not bad. It's very refreshing.

examples: I bought a souvenir for my mom.
This magnet is a souvenir from Paris.
The gift shop sells all kinds of souvenirs.
context: There are lots of souvenir shops in restaurants and so many things to see and do.

examples: Korean food can be very spicy.
I can't handle spicy food well.
Would you like it mild or spicy?
context: >> Hello. If I order a drink here, can it be brought to my chair over there? Okay, thank you. Can I please get one peach on the beach and one spicy royale? And that's it. I'm going to read my book while I wait for my cocktail. I just started this new fantasy novel. It's called The House in the Cerulean Sea.

Thank you so much. This place is so bougie. They deliver food and drinks right to your chair. I ordered the spicy one for myself. Looks spicy. I guess I like to torture myself. Okay, here goes nothing.
